gauge.name: Buffalo Fork above Lava Creek near Moran

impacts.statement: Minor low land flooding intensifies and becomes more widespread.
Flood stage. Minor low land flooding.Record stage and flow---6,540 cfs (6/9/1981).

hydronotes.statement: Gauge reading may be affected by ice. Forecast flows are unadjusted for ice.
